description: Use homepage as canonical design contract, enforce prototype constraints, and normalize all marketplace-related prototype pages to one-to-one feature parity.

userStories.title: Publish homepage-derived prototype standards to agent documentation
userStories.description: As a design maintainer, I want a single homepage-derived standard document so that all prototype updates follow the same constraints and interaction contract.
acceptanceCriteria: Update agents/prototype-design-standards.md with homepage canonical contract and hard constraints
Document MCP-only editing policy for .pen updates
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create route and node baseline for command deck variants
userStories.description: As a prototype engineer, I want node-level baseline mapping for all command deck variants so that parity checks are deterministic.
acceptanceCriteria: List all marketplace command deck page IDs including full-scroll variants
Map required blocks: TopNav, homeTopStatsCard, homeSearch, homeBodyWrap, homePagination
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Normalize full-scroll Chinese marketplace pages to homepage contract
userStories.description: As a user, I want full-scroll Chinese marketplace pages to behave like the homepage contract so that interactions and information hierarchy remain consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Apply homepage block order and required modules to Chinese full-scroll pages
Ensure stats card, search utility order, and scroll-loading footer follow canonical contract
No clipped or overlapped blocks in touched pages
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Normalize full-scroll English marketplace pages to homepage contract
userStories.description: As a user, I want full-scroll English marketplace pages to keep one-to-one parity with Chinese and dark/light contracts.
acceptanceCriteria: Apply homepage block order and required modules to English full-scroll pages
Ensure English stats and loading copy are semantically aligned with Chinese variants
No clipped or overlapped blocks in touched pages
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Enforce stats card semantics and readable copy across all command deck pages
userStories.description: As a user, I want every stats card to expose clear numeric totals and meaningful promotional copy so that the information is readable and consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: statsMain uses numeric total format and remains dominant
statsSub and statsPromo copy are standardized by locale and device-friendly sizes
Trend label semantics are standardized and readable
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Replace click-only load-more controls with scroll-driven loading guidance
userStories.description: As a user, I want bottom loading behavior to match scroll-driven interaction so that list continuation feels natural and consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove loadMoreBtn from command deck footers
Footer text communicates auto-load on scroll and next-batch behavior by locale
Dark and light variants keep equivalent semantics and contrast
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Apply homepage constraints to search workspace pages
userStories.description: As a user, I want search workspace pages to follow the same hierarchy and density rules as homepage so that transition between pages is predictable.
acceptanceCriteria: Search workspace pages adopt canonical spacing, utility, and footer behavior rules
No noisy helper copy that conflicts with canonical interaction language
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Apply homepage constraints to skill detail pages
userStories.description: As a user, I want skill detail pages to keep the same readability and hierarchy constraints so that dense information remains scannable.
acceptanceCriteria: Skill detail pages align with card density and typography constraints
Dark and light variants keep one-to-one module parity
No clipping or overlap in detail critical regions
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Run clipping and overlap audit for all touched prototype pages
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want deterministic layout checks so that no prototype page ships with hidden or covered content.
acceptanceCriteria: Run layout snapshot audit on all touched pages
Fix all clipping and overlap findings in the same pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Publish final parity report for homepage-driven normalization
userStories.description: As a stakeholder, I want a final parity report so that I can validate completeness against the homepage contract.
acceptanceCriteria: Document before/after parity status per normalized page
Include node IDs for key modules and unresolved risks if any
Typecheck passes
